findings.title: Prefer PEP 639 SPDX license form at impl
findings.description: Use license = "Apache-2.0" + license-files = ["LICENSE"] instead of legacy file-form.
findings.fix_action: Switch to SPDX expression in pyproject.toml at impl time.

findings.title: Add [tool.uv] block if using uv resolver
findings.description: If uv is the canonical resolver, declare [tool.uv] in pyproject.toml.
findings.fix_action: Add at impl if uv is chosen.
